creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 210466
handbrake-1.3.1.patch

HandBrake 1.3.1 has been released.
The attached 'handbrake-1.3.1.patch' upgrades multimedia/handbrake port to 1.3.1.
This patch is simple that contains following fixes.

1. remove `patch-gtk_src_Makefile.am`
    This patch has already been merged by upstream.

2. update ffmpeg to 4.2.2 in CONTRIB_FILES.
    Upstream has updated to this version.

3. update 'version.txt'
    Picked from released source archive.

My poudriere build has successfully finished on FreeBSD 12.1/12.0/11.3 amd64/i386.
